code:
import string
import io
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn geti(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn tokens_equal(_ s: String, _ a: Int, _ ae: Int, _ b: Int, _ be: Int) -> Bool
  let la = ae - a
  let lb = be - b
  if la != lb
    false
  else
    mut i = 0
    mut eq = true
    while i < la and eq
      let x = byte_at_or(s, a + i)
      let y = byte_at_or(s, b + i)
      if x != y
        eq = false
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    eq
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut starts: List<Int> = []
  mut ends: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut in_ws = true
    while in_ws and i < n
      let b = byte_at_or(s, i)
      if b >= 0 and is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        in_ws = false
      end
    end
    if i < n
      let st = i
      mut in_tok = true
      while in_tok and i < n
        let b = byte_at_or(s, i)
        if b >= 0 and not is_ws(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          in_tok = false
        end
      end
      starts = list.push(starts, st)
      ends = list.push(ends, i)
    end
  end

  let nt = list.len(starts)
  mut best_s = 0
  mut best_e = 0
  mut best_c = 0
  mut idx = 0
  while idx < nt
    let si = geti(starts, idx)
    let ei = geti(ends, idx)
    mut j = 0
    mut dup = false
    while j < idx and not dup
      let sj = geti(starts, j)
      let ej = geti(ends, j)
      if tokens_equal(s, si, ei, sj, ej)
        dup = true
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not dup
      mut k = 0
      mut c = 0
      while k < nt
        let sk = geti(starts, k)
        let ek = geti(ends, k)
        if tokens_equal(s, si, ei, sk, ek)
          c = c + 1
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      if c > best_c
        best_c = c
        best_s = si
        best_e = ei
      end
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end

  let tok = string.substring(s, best_s, best_e)
  print("top=#{tok}=#{best_c}")
end
